scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @premon/guard build && pnpm --filter @premon/wallet-adapter build && pnpm --filter @premon/ui build && pnpm --filter @premon/showcase-ui build && VITE_ANALYZE_URL=/api pnpm --filter @premon/showcase build && WALLET_BASE=/wallet/ VITE_ANALYZE_URL=/api pnpm --filter @premon/wallet build && rm -rf apps/showcase/dist/wallet && cp -r apps/wallet/dist apps/showcase/dist/wallet
